action.text:
&CommandCheckLockedDate;
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @t nvarchar(4000), @u nvarchar(4000), @unitKey nvarchar(4000) select @t = text from @s select @t = substring(@t, 0, len(@t)) select ltrim(data) as stt, cast('' as varchar(33)) as ma_dvcs, identity(int,1,1) as n into #t from dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@t, ',')
select @u = text from @su select @u = substring(@u, 0, len(@u)) select ltrim(data) as ma_dvcs, identity(int,1,1) as n into #u from dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$Split(@u, ',') update #t set ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs from #t a left join #u b on a.n = b.n
select top 0 ma_dvcs, ma_loai_lg, ma_bp, identity(int,1,1) as stt into #k from hrbtkcl
-- if @ma_dvcs = '' begin if exists(select 1 from dmdvcsks where ma_dvcs in (select a.ma_dvcs from sysunitrights a join (select distinct ma_dvcs from #t) b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where user_id = @@userID) and ngay_ks >= @$d) begin select 'ky' as field, @$lockedDate as message return end end
-- if @type = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin if exists(select 1 from sysunitrights a join (select distinct ma_dvcs from #t) b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where a.user_id = @@userID and a.r_new = 0) begin select 'ky' as field, @$NotAuthorized as message return end end
select @unitKey = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetUnitFilterEx('a.ma_dvcs', @ma_dvcs, @@userID, @@admin, 'New') select @q = 'insert into #k(ma_dvcs, ma_loai_lg, ma_bp) select a.ma_dvcs, a.ma_loai_lg, a.ma_bp from hrbtkcl a join #t b on a.stt = b.stt' + case when @unitKey is not null then ' where ' + @unitKey else '' end + ' order by a.stt' exec sp_executesql @q
exec hs_PostSalary2GL '&Code;', @ky, @nam, @ma_dvcs, @@userID, @@admin end
if @type = '9' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin if exists(select 1 from sysunitrights a join (select distinct ma_dvcs from #t) b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where a.user_id = @@userID and a.r_del = 0) begin select 'ky' as field, @$NotAuthorized as message return end end
select @unitKey = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetUnitFilterEx('a.ma_dvcs', @ma_dvcs, @@userID, @@admin, 'Delete') select @q = 'insert into #k(ma_dvcs, ma_loai_lg, ma_bp) select a.ma_dvcs, a.ma_loai_lg, a.ma_bp from hrbtkcl a join #t b on a.stt = b.stt' + case when @unitKey is not null then ' where ' + @unitKey else '' end + ' order by a.stt' exec sp_executesql @q
exec hs_DeleteSalaryFromGL @ky, @nam, @ma_dvcs, @@userID, @@admin end
select '' as field, '' as message return
